query: UPDATE users SET open_id = CONCAT('local:', CAST(id AS CHAR)) WHERE open_id IS NULL OR open_id = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3x57m6Dk121nXW6.root --database Nz8norEy9cHW8BGGws8Uod --execute UPDATE users SET open_id = CONCAT('local:', CAST(id AS CHAR)) WHERE open_id IS NULL OR open_id = '';
